failedAssertions.reason: The saved encrypted imported-key identity survived relaunch and the focused legacy PEM probe reached TCP connect, SSH authentication, and shell-channel open against 10.0.2.2:3122, but the shipped relaunched app-shell connect path still failed with "Connection timed out while reaching 10.0.2.2:3122." instead of reaching a live terminal session.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that SessionSshFixtureInstrumentedTest#imported_key_identity_survives_relaunch_and_reaches_real_terminal_session is currently a diagnostic proof and that VAL-CROSS-001 must inspect both the successful legacy PEM probe log and the separate shipped UI timeout log before claiming pass.
